10816577077441.name: Acqua di Gio Eau de Parfum
10816577077441.desc: A modern, sustainable interpretation of the classic Acqua di Gio, featuring marine notes, green mandarin, and aromatic herbs.
10816577077441.scentJourney: Opens with a burst of sparkling green mandarin and marine notes, transitioning into a heart of aromatic clary sage and lavender, settling into a base of mineral notes, vetiver, and patchouli.
10816577077441.brandStory: Giorgio Armani is a legendary Italian fashion house known for its timeless elegance and minimalist aesthetic. The fragrance line, launched in the 1980s, has become a global benchmark for luxury perfumery, blending high-quality ingredients with sophisticated, wearable compositions.
10816577077441.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results, apply to clean, hydrated skin.

10826245734593.name: Eclaire Banoffi
10826245734593.desc: A gourmand unisex fragrance inspired by the banoffee dessert, featuring notes of banana, dulce de leche, and whipped cream.
10826245734593.brandStory: Lattafa Perfumes is a prominent fragrance house based in the United Arab Emirates, known for producing high-quality, affordable scents that often draw inspiration from popular designer and niche profiles. They have gained a global following for their extensive range of oriental and western-style fragrances.
10826245734593.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results with an EDP, spray onto clean, moisturized skin and avoid rubbing the fragrance into the skin.
